body:
At the moment, the ocean is predominant in ClimaOcean. However, this PR is an attempt to generalize the code to allow different ocean simulations as well as different atmosphere.

The main objective of this PR is to remove component-specific methods from `InterfaceComputations` and bring them into appropriate `OceanSimulations`, `SeaIceSimulations` and `AtmosphereSimulations` modules.

In addition another objective is to generalize the exchanger which means adding an `interpolate_sea_ice_state!` and `interpolate_ocean_state!` functions.

I am a bit unsure about the `compute_net_*_fluxes!` methods. Should they live in the `InterfaceComputations` module or in the components modules? I feel like the latter option would be cleaner but potentially lead to code duplication.

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: (0.9.0) Modify interface to generalize the coupling
